title: Fimbristylis thwaitesii

The genus Fimbristylis, to which this species belongs, consists of several species of sedges found in tropical and subtropical regions of the world. intro: Fimbristylis thwaitesii, also known as Thwaites' fimbristylis, is a type of aquatic grass that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine, and its health benefits include the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory infections.
